title: CQC annual report and accounts 2023 to 2024
body: " This report details the performance of the Care Quality Commission (CQC) in the financial year 2023 to 2024. The performance activities cover CQC’s priorities for:   people and communities smarter regulation safety through learning accelerating improvement in health and social care services   Running through each theme are 2 core ambitions:   assessing local systems - providing independent assurance to the public on the quality of care in their area tackling inequalities in health and care - pushing for equality of access, experiences and outcomes from health and social care services  "
